summary: UI Developer with 4+ years of hands-on experience building scalable, high-performance web applications across HealthCare, Casino Gaming, and B2B Marketing Automation domains. Proven expertise in Angular, React, TypeScript, and RxJS — delivering enterprise-grade solutions with modular architecture, RBAC, REST API integration, and responsive design. Adept at collaborating in Agile teams, mentoring junior developers, and consistently optimizing application performance across complex, cross-domain projects.

experience.title: UI Developer
experience.description: Developed MassEngage Lead Accelerator B2B marketing automation platform
bullets: Led frontend transformation of a scalable B2B SaaS lead generation platform using Angular 13
Designed modular architecture with lazy-loaded feature modules and reusable UI components
Engineered a dynamic campaign workflow builder with graphical visualization and automated lead scoring
Implemented Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) using route guards and permission-driven UI rendering
Built automated lead lifecycle management: real-time assignment, email notifications with Excel reports, and intelligent redistribution logic for rejected leads
Developed lead export features (XLSX/PDF) and analytics dashboards
Optimized performance using RxJS, Observables, and efficient API state handling

experience.title: Software Developer
experience.description: Developed Healthcare Trial Accelerator Platform for streamlining clinical trial lifecycle management
bullets: Led frontend development using Angular 14, ensuring scalable and maintainable architecture
Designed and developed reusable components and services with Angular best practices
Collaborated closely with product owners and backend teams to define and integrate REST APIs
Implemented state management, lazy loading, and modular design to improve app performance
Conducted code reviews, mentored junior developers, and ensured adherence to coding standards
Worked with QA and DevOps teams to streamline deployment and bug tracking processes
Ensured the application met accessibility (WCAG) and HIPAA compliance guidelines

experience.title: Sr. Software Developer
experience.description: Developed dynamic and engaging online slot games for a global casino gaming platform (MG Asia)
bullets: Developed user-friendly slot game UIs optimized for cross-platform play (desktop, tablet, mobile)
Integrated dynamic reel animations, symbol transitions, and bonus effects using PixiJS and Canvas
Implemented multiple payline configurations, 3-reel/5-reel mechanics, wilds, scatters, and bonus rounds
Ensured RNG-based fair play compliance and performance optimization for smooth gameplay
Added free spins, multipliers, and progressive jackpots for enhanced engagement
Built real-time leaderboards and a player rewards system with in-game achievements
Contributed to analytics integration for player behavior tracking and game performance insights

experience.title: UI Developer
experience.description: Developed MSettu and Nahikalii platforms for Mahindra & Mahindra managing various business processes
bullets: Designed a digital platform (MSettu) to streamline financial operations, supply chain management, and real-time reporting for Mahindra & Mahindra
Built Nahikalii as a responsive, interactive UI using React.js ensuring cross-device compatibility
Integrated REST APIs for real-time data updates and optimized performance through lazy loading
Applied SASS for custom UI styling; implemented D3.js and Pixi.JS for data visualizations
Ensured timely delivery through Agile collaboration with version control via Git

experience.title: SME
experience.description: Developed a comprehensive Digital Learning platform for enhanced user experiences
bullets: Played a pivotal role in the development of a comprehensive digital learning platform
Integrated multi-modal content: video lectures, quizzes, assignments, and e-books to support diverse learning styles
Implemented personalized learning path algorithms to recommend tailored resources based on user progress
Created an automated assessment and grading system for real-time feedback and streamlined evaluations
Integrated data analytics to track user engagement and course effectiveness

strengths.description: Capable of quick learning and delivering effective solutions in a team setting, with daily stand-ups, peer reviews, and cross-functional Agile collaboration

strengths.title: Problem Solving
strengths.description: Strong analytical approach to breaking down complex UI challenges — from RNG-based game mechanics to HIPAA-compliant healthcare workflows

strengths.title: Adaptability
strengths.description: Quickly ramped up across diverse domains — healthcare, casino gaming, e-learning, e-publishing, and B2B marketing — adopting new tech stacks with each project

strengths.title: Mentoring & Leadership
strengths.description: Conducted code reviews, mentored junior developers, and ensured adherence to coding standards across multiple teams

strengths.title: Performance Optimisation
